zones.label: Your Nexus
zones.title: YOUR NEXUS
zones.desc: Your Nexus is the heart of your base. Minions spawn here and march down the lanes. Protect it at all costs.
zones.tip: If your Nexus is destroyed, your team loses the game.

zones.label: Enemy Nexus
zones.title: ENEMY NEXUS
zones.desc: The enemy Nexus is your ultimate target. To reach it you must push through their turrets and inhibitors.
zones.tip: Destroy the enemy Nexus to win the game.

zones.label: Turrets
zones.title: TURRETS
zones.desc: Turrets are powerful defensive structures lining each lane. They deal heavy damage to enemies.
zones.tip: Use minions as a shield when attacking turrets.

zones.label: Baron Nashor
zones.title: BARON NASHOR
zones.desc: The most powerful monster in the jungle. Killing Baron grants your team bonus AD, AP, and supercharges minions.
zones.tip: Baron spawns at 20 min. Contest it with your team.

zones.label: Dragon
zones.title: ELEMENTAL DRAKES
zones.desc: Dragons spawn in the river and grant permanent stacking buffs based on their element.
zones.tip: Stack 4 drake souls for a powerful elemental buff.
